author: jtraglia
content: <@586161934425128960> <@680234424037670912> and others... I've made a PR to remove the "ignore bls to execution change messages before the capella fork epoch" gossip check (https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5205). Please take a look. I would be especially interested to hear thoughts from <@755590043632140352> & <@425572898787426305> since they left comments on the PR which added this.

author: tersec
content: Nimbus can't really check it properly unless it has a Capella state: https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth2/blob/102be79c06b408c4901fc73d92cbc8397c39425f/beacon_chain/gossip_processing/gossip_validation.nim#L1538-L1549

author: tersec
content: https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth2/blob/102be79c06b408c4901fc73d92cbc8397c39425f/beacon_chain/spec/beaconstate.nim#L1155-L1184 simply is not defined pre-Capella, it doesn't exist
